title: Chaotic Rebirth[BP]
description: every month the project receives a global update. You can contribute to the project by voting for an update in Discord
body:
![rebirth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff338e6effdf2319870e7eb45890d3c0fb6803c0.png)
 ### <center> A modpack created for server that is governed by democracy

![white line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7cb1bf2981c8d001e5a6134e2b95ad7e38d1ea7.png)
 
<center>This modpack was designed for a private Minecraft server where players vote each month on which patch to add next.
  
### What is a patch?
Patch - one of three collections of mods of a certain theme(for example world generation or combat update) for which players will be able to vote in [Discord]([https://discord.gg/uJqUvmx9Ms](https://discord.gg/uJqUvmx9Ms))
### Is there a launcher here? 
It would be soon, but it is the secret
### What language is the server actually in?
At the moment only russian, but as the project grows, we will add Ukrainian and English.

![white line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7cb1bf2981c8d001e5a6134e2b95ad7e38d1ea7.png)

[Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@BPpulsik) [Twitter](https://x.com/mminelabb) [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/
